title: Senior Software Engineer - Nucleus Software - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Nucleus Software - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Nucleus Software. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Software Engineer to strengthen our Surat-based team.

About Nucleus Software:
Nucleus Software is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nucleus Software!
